★ The Holy Grail of Retirement ★

A Retirement Planning Framework

✦

Freedom in retirement is not found in a single decision.
It is found when the entire structure is built to hold.

Retirement introduces new forces — income timing, tax exposure, healthcare costs, legislative change, and market volatility. The Retire REGAL® framework organizes retirement across five connected realms and identifies the structural risks that can destabilize even well-funded plans.

Read the Book Schedule a Review

★ The Challenge ★

Why Even Well-Prepared
Retirees Feel Uncertain

You did the right things. You saved consistently. Stayed invested. Paid attention.

Yet something about the plan still feels unsettled. That feeling is not irrational. It is information.

The strategies that build wealth are not always the strategies that preserve freedom. Retirement introduces new forces — and they rarely arrive one at a time.

Income timing and withdrawal strategy
Tax exposure from deferred savings
Healthcare costs and longevity
Legislative and policy changes
Market volatility during withdrawals

No plan eliminates risk, but structure can help reduce its impact.

★ The System ★

The Retire REGAL® Framework

The Retire REGAL® framework organizes retirement into five connected areas known as the Five Realms. Each realm influences the others — which is precisely why they must be addressed together.

R
Retirement Income
How assets become sustainable income once employment stops — structured for durability, not just volume.
E
Employer Plan Rollovers
The moment assets built for accumulation must be reorganized for income, tax efficiency, and flexibility.
G
Government Strategies
Social Security timing, Medicare rules, and tax legislation shape every retirement decision.
A
Asset Management
The REGAL Stronghold™ organizes assets by role rather than arbitrary allocation percentages.
L
Legacy Planning
Ensuring assets move intentionally to heirs, charities, and future generations — with clarity and efficiency.

★ Know Your Adversaries ★

The Five Foemen of Retirement

Retirement risks rarely arrive alone. Within the Retire REGAL® framework, five structural forces threaten even the most carefully built plans.

The Income Hydra
Withdrawal strain, inflation, and longevity — cut one head, two more emerge.
The Tax Kraken
Growing tax liability from decades of deferred saving — lurking beneath the surface.
The Legislative Leviathan
Changing tax rules, benefit formulas, and policy shifts outside your control.
The Market Dragon
Volatility and sequence-of-returns risk — most dangerous during withdrawal years.
The Health Basilisk
Healthcare costs, longevity risk, and unexpected medical events that petrify a plan.

★ Asset Architecture ★

The REGAL Stronghold™

Traditional portfolios focus on allocation. The REGAL Stronghold™ focuses on architecture. Assets are organized into three layers — each with a defined role in defending your retirement structure.

Top Layer
⚔ Battlement
Growth-oriented assets positioned for flexibility, tax planning opportunities, and long-term growth.
Mid Layer
🏰 Walls
Assets designed to absorb volatility while producing durable, consistent income.
Foundation
🪨 Foundation
Assets and income designed for stability and reliability — Social Security, pensions, treasuries, and fixed annuities.

This structure does not eliminate risk. It helps contain how risks interact.

The book introduces the philosophy and framework behind the Retire REGAL® process. It explains why traditional retirement advice often falls short once income begins — and how coordinated planning across the Five Realms creates a structure designed to hold under pressure.

★ Your Guide ★

Chris Owens

Founder, Owens Financial Group | Architect of the Retire REGAL® Process

Chris Owens is the founder of Owens Financial Group and the architect of the Retire REGAL® Process. His work focuses on helping individuals transition from accumulation to living — organizing retirement around income durability, tax coordination, and intentional asset structure.

Chris has been recognized through the Million Dollar Round Table Court of the Table and works with individuals and families approaching retirement who want greater clarity and structure in their planning decisions.
